raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to check the artifact centrally includes assessing whether the proposed method, thesis, and contribution framing cohere above the sentence level.","R1.2":"Logical consistency is load-bearing because the artifact makes technical claims about Newton-Raphson, likelihood equations, updates, and convergence that must not contradict one another.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is central because the artifact reports empirical convergence and performance improvements that are used to support the recommendation.","R1.6":"Writing polish is central because a generic request to check a research draft normally includes sentence-level clarity, register, and concision issues.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is always active to mark limits of what can be inferred from the provided artifact alone.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is always active because the artifact contains broad methodological and recommendation claims.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is always active to ensure the projection does not execute, rewrite, or critique the artifact.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is always active because incorrect validation of a research method could mislead later scientific or operational use.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is always active to preserve clear linkage between responsibility assignments and the supplied delegation-artifact pair."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to check the artifact centrally includes assessing whether the proposed method, thesis, and contribution framing cohere above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is load-bearing because the artifact makes technical claims about Newton-Raphson, likelihood equations, updates, and convergence that must not contradict one another.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is central because the artifact reports empirical convergence and performance improvements that are used to support the recommendation.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is central because a generic request to check a research draft normally includes sentence-level clarity, register, and concision issues.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is always active to mark limits of what can be inferred from the provided artifact alone.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is always active because the artifact contains broad methodological and recommendation claims.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is always active to ensure the projection does not execute, rewrite, or critique the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is always active because incorrect validation of a research method could mislead later scientific or operational use.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is always active to preserve clear linkage between responsibility assignments and the supplied delegation-artifact pair.
